name: drugInteractionCheck
_note: EXTERNAL-IO (OpenFDA SPL label fetch) — marked external_io:true so the live network path is NOT assassin-driven; the validation-rejection fuzz cases below never reach fetch (they bail before the loop). Pulls each drug's DRUG_INTERACTIONS+WARNINGS label text and reports cross-mentions. result carries BOTH the canonical coMentions[] (PharmacyActionPanel) AND interactions[] (the SAME real array, what the FdaDrugReference InteractionsPanel + page interaction list render) — no phantom field; each pair has a real grounded {drug1,drug2,severity:'review-label',effect} where `effect` describes which FDA label mentions which. medicationsChecked = distinct screened names. <2 non-empty names rejects with 'at least 2 medications required' (never a fake 'all clear'). Fail-soft on network/parse error → {ok:false, error}. Pinned by server/tests/pharmacy-lens-macros.test.js (fetch stubbed).
